settings.heading: From people I have worked with

settings.title: How much does the Playbook cost?
settings.content: Nothing. It is free. You trade your email address, and you can unsubscribe any time.

settings.title: Do I need a big following for this to work?
settings.content: No. The system is built to work from wherever you are right now.

settings.title: How will I receive it?
settings.content: Placeholder. Describe the delivery format here once the Playbook file is final.

settings.title: Will you email me constantly?
settings.content: No. You will get the Playbook, then occasional practical emails. Unsubscribe whenever you want.

settings.heading: Own your audience
settings.text: The Playbook is free, it is practical, and it is the same system I use with coaching clients.
